task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements are met: (1) RenameRequest struct in api/types.go with Source and Destination fields properly json-tagged as 'source' and 'destination'; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go that POSTs to /api/rename; (3) RenameHandler on Server in routes.go that validates models, returns 404 when source is missing, returns 409 when destination exists, and delegates to RenameModel; (4) RenameModel in server/images.go that copies then deletes atomically; (5) Route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) properly wired; (6) CLI command 'ollama rename SOURCE DESTINATION' using cobra with ExactArgs(2), PreRunE heartbeat check, and RunE handler; (7) CLI RenameHandler correctly creates client, constructs request from args, calls client.Rename, and prints success message; (8) No existing test files modified, all existing code preserved. Implementation follows established patterns from Copy/Delete operations and is production-ready.
